mapper.select: SELECT BEAN_NAME FROM tenant.TENT_SVC WHERE TENT_ID = #{tenantId} AND SVC_CD = #{serviceCode} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT MST.TENT_ID AS tenantId, CFG.DB_TP_CD AS dbType, CFG.DB_HOST AS dbHost, CFG.DB_PORT AS dbPort, CFG.DB_NM AS dbName, CFG.DB_USR_NM AS dbUsername, CFG.DB_PWD AS dbPassword, CFG.USE_FLG AS useFlg, CFG.CRE_USR_ID AS creUsrId, CFG.CRE_DT AS creDt, CFG.UPD_USR_ID AS updUsrId, CFG.UPD_DT AS updDt FROM tenant.TENT_DB_CFG CFG JOIN tenant.TENT_MST MST ON CFG.TENT_ID = MST.TENT_ID WHERE MST.TENT_ID = #{tenantId} AND MST.USE_FLG = 'Y' AND CFG.USE_FLG = 'Y' AND CFG.PRIORITY = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT MDL.TENT_ID AS tenantId, MDL.MDL_CD AS moduleCode, MDL.USE_FLG AS useFlg, MDL.VLD_FM AS validityFrom, MDL.VLD_TO AS validityTo FROM tenant.TENT_MDL MDL JOIN tenant.TENT_MST MST ON MDL.TENT_ID = MST.TENT_ID WHERE MDL.TENT_ID = #{tenantId} AND MDL.MDL_CD = #{moduleCode} AND MST.USE_FLG = 'Y' LIMIT 1
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM tenant.TENT_MST WHERE TENT_ID = #{tenantId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y'
